title: Download health coverage exemption forms
meta-description: Download the form to your desktop computer and follow the steps to fill out an exemption application to enroll in a Catastrophic Plan.
bite: Download the form to your desktop computer and follow the steps to fill out an exemption application to enroll in a Catastrophic Plan.
excerpt: Download the form to your desktop computer and follow the steps to fill out an exemption application to enroll in a Catastrophic Plan.
content:
To fill out a health coverage exemption application, download it onto your desktop or laptop computer (not your phone or tablet).

Step 1: Download the correct form for your situation

When you select a form below, it will automatically download to your computer.

  • Hardship exemption application form (PDF, 747 KB) for situations like homelessness, bankruptcy, eviction, or foreclosure.
    • Spanish hardship exemption application form (PDF, 768 KB)
  • Affordability exemption application form (PDF, 893 KB) if you live in:
    • Alabama, Alaska, Arizona, Arkansas, Delaware, Florida, Hawaii, Indiana, Iowa, Kansas, Louisiana, Michigan, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, North Carolina, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma, Oregon, South Carolina, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, West Virginia, Wisconsin, Wyoming
    • Spanish affordability exemption application form (PDF, 923 KB)
  • Affordability exemption application form (PDF, 794 KB) if you live in:
    • Colorado, Georgia, Idaho, Illinois, Kentucky, Maine, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Nevada, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, Vermont, Virginia, Washington
    • Spanish affordability exemption application form (PDF, 777 KB)

Step 2: Open the form in Adobe Reader

Use Adobe Reader on a desktop computer to open these forms. You can't open this form using your web browser or mobile device (phone or tablet).
  1. If you don't have Adobe Reader version 8 or higher, download the latest version for free.
  2. Locate the form on your computer. If you can't find it, check your "Downloads" folder.
  3. Select and open the document.

Step 3: Complete the form

Read the form instructions and fill it out. When you're done:

  1. Save your changes—Save the completed form to a folder or place on your computer where it will be easy to find later.
  2. Print and mail it to the Health Insurance Marketplace® at the address shown on the form.

If you're having trouble opening the form or filling it out, contact the Marketplace Call Center.
